channel.title: LLM Timeline — China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute.

image.title: LLM Timeline — China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute Models

item.title: T1 (China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute)
item.category: China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute
item.description: Parameters: T1 License: open Type: model

item.title: Unnamed 1T (China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute)
item.category: China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute
item.description: Parameters: Unnamed 1T License: closed Type: model Trained on Chinese GPUs: "Ascend Atlas 800T A2 training server – a Huawei product listed as supporting the Kunpeng 920 7265 or Kunpeng 920 5250 processors" https://www.theregister.com/2024/10/02/china_telecom_model_trained_local_tech/

item.title: TeleChat2-115B (China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute)
item.category: China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute
item.description: Parameters: TeleChat2-115B License: open Type: model Trained on Chinese GPUs: "Ascend Atlas 800T A2 training server – a Huawei product listed as supporting the Kunpeng 920 7265 or Kunpeng 920 5250 processors" https://www.theregister.com/2024/10/02/china_telecom_model_trained_local_tech/
